title: TUI Panel Focus, Scroll, And Mouse V1 Execution Root
description: Non-runnable feature container for coordinating the TUI runtime update, focused regression tests, README control documentation, and final review for panel focus, scrolling, and mouse support.
acceptance_criteria: Child beads cover runtime implementation, focused test coverage, README control updates, and review signoff.
The plan preserves the current TUI layout and existing operator flows outside the new focus/scroll/mouse behavior.
Dependencies enforce implementation before validation, documentation, and review.
